title: Under-Utilized Schemes (Subquery)
description: Write a query to find schemes where the average utilized_budget_cr is below the overall average utilized_budget_cr across all schemes. Return year, scheme_name, state_code, and utilized_budget_cr. Use a subquery inside a WHERE clause with IN and HAVING.

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH01','PM Awas Yojana','MH',2020,2035.2,1828.7)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH01','PM Awas Yojana','UP',2020,1800.0,1200.0)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','MH',2020,1180.6,1096.1)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','UP',2020,1100.0,980.0)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH03','State Skill Program','MH',2020,5289.3,4852.9)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH03','State Skill Program','KA',2020,4800.0,4400.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT year, scheme_name, state_code, utilized_budget_cr FROM scheme_budget_utilization WHERE scheme_name IN (SELECT scheme_name FROM scheme_budget_utilization GROUP BY scheme_name HAVING AVG(utilized_budget_cr) < (SELECT AVG(utilized_budget_cr) FROM scheme_budget_utilization))

testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT year, scheme_name, state_code, utilized_budget_cr FROM scheme_budget_utilization WHERE scheme_name IN (SELECT scheme_name FROM scheme_budget_utilization GROUP BY scheme_name HAVING AVG(utilized_budget_cr) < (SELECT AVG(utilized_budget_cr) FROM scheme_budget_utilization))
